title: crataegus cuneata var. tangchungchangii
intro: Crataegus cuneata var. tangchungchangii is a variety of the hawthorn tree (Crataegus), a flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant is used in traditional medicine, particularly for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and cardiovascular-protective effects. The health benefits of Crataegus cuneata var. tangchungchangii include reducing blood pressure, improving cardiovascular function, and enhancing overall well-being. Herbal preparations of the plant, such as teas, infusions, and extracts, are used to support heart health and alleviate symptoms associated with cardiovascular disease.
